title: Bare Bones Golden Crown
description: Tired of the normal gold helmet ,try out this golden crown texturepack that fits the barebone style!
body:
ABOUT:
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This texturepack changes the golden helmet texture to a crown! All of the trims are changed to match the shape of the crown. _Enjoy_!


![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e87845c3a337a6443eee54ab7edd67262dc11f3.png)
